name: Episode Synopsis
template_content:
I missed the most recent episode of a show I am watching and the new episode airs tonight, so I don't have time to rewatch the episode I missed. I have provided the transcript from the missed episode and am asking you to capture all key points so I can watch the next episodes without being lost or missing any context. Thank you in advance.
Include the following information in your output:
Show name: (if available)
Season-Episode: (if available)

Here is the episode transcript:
{transcript}
